<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import ComboboxPortal from "./combobox-portal.svelte";
	import { cn, type WithoutChild, type WithoutChildrenOrChild } from "$UTILS$.js";
	import type { ComponentProps } from "svelte";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		sideOffset = 6,
		align = "start",
		portalProps,
		children,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<ComboboxPrimitive.ContentProps> & {
		portalProps?: WithoutChildrenOrChild<ComponentProps<typeof ComboboxPortal>>;
	} = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPortal {...portalProps}>
	<ComboboxPrimitive.Content
		bind:ref
		data-slot="combobox-content"
		{sideOffset}
		{align}
		class={cn(
			"bg-popover text-popover-foreground data-open:animate-in data-closed:animate-out data-closed:fade-out-0 data-open:fade-in-0 data-closed:zoom-out-95 data-open:zoom-in-95 data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2 data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2 ring-foreground/10 *:data-[slot=input-group]:bg-input/30 *:data-[slot=input-group]:border-input/30 max-h-72 min-w-36 overflow-hidden rounded-lg shadow-md ring-1 duration-100 *:data-[slot=input-group]:m-1 *:data-[slot=input-group]:mb-0 *:data-[slot=input-group]:h-8 *:data-[slot=input-group]:shadow-none cn-menu-target cn-menu-translucent bg-popover text-popover-foreground relative isolate z-50 max-h-96 w-(--bits-combobox-anchor-width) overflow-hidden rounded-md shadow-md outline-hidden",
			className
		)}
		{...restProps}
	>
		{@render children?.()}
	</ComboboxPrimitive.Content>
</ComboboxPortal>
{@render children?.()}

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import { cn, type WithoutChild } from "$UTILS$.js";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		children,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<ComboboxPrimitive.GroupProps> = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.Group bind:ref data-slot="combobox-group" class={cn(className)} {...restProps}>
	{@render children?.()}
</ComboboxPrimitive.Group>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import { getContext } from "svelte";
	import * as InputGroup from "$UI$/input-group/index.js";
	import { cn, type WithoutChild } from "$UTILS$.js";
	import IconPlaceholder from "$lib/components/icon-placeholder/icon-placeholder.svelte";
	import { COMBOBOX_CONTEXT, type ComboboxContext } from "./context.js";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		children,
		disabled = false,
		showTrigger = true,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<ComboboxPrimitive.InputProps> & {
		showTrigger?: boolean;
		disabled?: boolean;
	} = $props();

	const combobox = getContext<ComboboxContext | undefined>(COMBOBOX_CONTEXT);

	function handleFocus(event: FocusEvent, onFocus: unknown) {
		combobox?.setOpen(true);

		if (typeof onFocus === "function") {
			onFocus(event);
		}
	}
</script>

<InputGroup.Root class={cn("w-auto", className)}>
	<ComboboxPrimitive.Input bind:ref {disabled} {...restProps}>
		{#snippet child({ props })}
			<InputGroup.Input
				{...props}
				{disabled}
				onfocus={(event) => {
					handleFocus(event, props.onfocus);
				}}
			/>
		{/snippet}
	</ComboboxPrimitive.Input>
	<InputGroup.Addon align="inline-end">
		{#if showTrigger}
			<ComboboxPrimitive.Trigger>
				{#snippet child({ props })}
					<InputGroup.Button
						{...props}
						size="icon-xs"
						variant="ghost"
						class="data-pressed:bg-transparent"
						{disabled}
					>
						<IconPlaceholder
							lucide="ChevronDownIcon"
							tabler="IconSelector"
							hugeicons="UnfoldMoreIcon"
							phosphor="CaretDownIcon"
							remixicon="RiArrowDownSLine"
							class="pointer-events-none"
						/>
					</InputGroup.Button>
				{/snippet}
			</ComboboxPrimitive.Trigger>
		{/if}
	</InputGroup.Addon>
	{@render children?.()}
</InputGroup.Root>
{#snippet children({ selected, highlighted })} {#if childrenProp} {@render childrenProp({ selected, highlighted })} {:else} {label || value} {/if} {#if selected} {/if} {/snippet}

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import { cn, type WithoutChild } from "$UTILS$.js";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		children,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<ComboboxPrimitive.GroupHeadingProps> = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.GroupHeading
	bind:ref
	data-slot="combobox-label"
	class={cn("text-muted-foreground px-2 py-1.5 text-xs", className)}
	{...restProps}
>
	{@render children?.()}
</ComboboxPrimitive.GroupHeading>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import { cn, type WithoutChild } from "$UTILS$.js";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		children,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<ComboboxPrimitive.ViewportProps> = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.Viewport
	bind:ref
	data-slot="combobox-list"
	class={cn(
		"max-h-[min(24rem,var(--bits-combobox-content-available-height))] overflow-y-auto p-1",
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
>
	{@render children?.()}
</ComboboxPrimitive.Viewport>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from "bits-ui";

	let { ...restProps }: ComboboxPrimitive.PortalProps = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.Portal {...restProps} />

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import { cn, type WithoutChildrenOrChild } from "$UTILS$.js";
	import type { ComponentProps } from "svelte";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChildrenOrChild<ComponentProps<typeof ComboboxPrimitive.Separator>> = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.Separator
	bind:ref
	data-slot="combobox-separator"
	class={cn("bg-border -mx-1 my-1 h-px", className)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import { cn } from "$UTILS$.js";
	import IconPlaceholder from "$lib/components/icon-placeholder/icon-placeholder.svelte";

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		children,
		...restProps
	}: ComboboxPrimitive.TriggerProps = $props();
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.Trigger
	bind:ref
	data-slot="combobox-trigger"
	class={cn("[&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4", className)}
	{...restProps}
>
	{@render children?.()}
	<IconPlaceholder
		lucide="ChevronDownIcon"
		tabler="IconSelector"
		hugeicons="UnfoldMoreIcon"
		phosphor="CaretDownIcon"
		remixicon="RiArrowDownSLine"
		class="text-muted-foreground pointer-events-none size-4"
	/>
</ComboboxPrimitive.Trigger>

<script lang="ts">
	import { Combobox as ComboboxPrimitive } from "bits-ui";
	import { setContext, type Snippet } from "svelte";
	import { COMBOBOX_CONTEXT, type ComboboxContext } from "./context.js";

	type Props = {
		children?: Snippet;
		value?: string;
		defaultValue?: string;
		inputValue?: string;
		open?: boolean;
		name?: string;
		disabled?: boolean;
		required?: boolean;
		loop?: boolean;
		onValueChange?: (value: string) => void;
		onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void;
		onOpenChangeComplete?: (open: boolean) => void;
	};

	let {
		value = $bindable(""),
		open = $bindable(false),
		inputValue,
		...restProps
	}: Props = $props();

	setContext<ComboboxContext>(COMBOBOX_CONTEXT, {
		setOpen: (value) => {
			open = value;
		},
	});
</script>

<ComboboxPrimitive.Root bind:value bind:open type="single" {inputValue} {...restProps} />
